title: Solve for $$t$$ in the x(t) Equation
text: Solving for $$t$$ in the x(t) equation, we get $$t=\frac{x+1}{2}=\frac{1}{2} x+\frac{1}{2}$$.

title: Substitute $$t$$ Into the y(t) Equation
text: Use $$t=\frac{1}{2} x+\frac{1}{2}$$ and plug into the y(t) equation to obtain the cartesian equation.
